name: coalboard
description: CoalBoard — a diverse-lens consensus & debate board (with consent). Its primary trigger is error-not-allowed work; convened manually it generalizes to any hard problem worth several perspectives. Part of the TheColliery mining series.

plugins.name: coalboard
plugins.description: Diverse-lens consensus & debate board. Its primary auto-trigger is error-not-allowed work (security/crypto, migrations, high-precision math); convened manually it generalizes to any hard problem worth several perspectives. With consent it convenes diverse epistemic lenses in parallel (empirical/source-grounded, formal, a show-me skeptic), a judge synthesizes on VERIFIED inputs, an independent out-of-frame solver breaks ties, and the human signs off. Guarantees bounded cost (no whack-a-mole) and zero-breakage (staging); improves correctness without claiming a reliability number. Off ~90% of the time. Cross-agent (verified: Claude Code + Antigravity; others designed-for, unverified; Claude Code adds cost-optimized tiering). Zero-dependency, offline, no API keys.
